en.name: CMMG Mk47 5.45x39 254mm barrel
en.description: A 254mm Mk47 barrel chambered for 5.45x39mm and fitted for the dedicated Mk47 5.45 upper receiver. The compact length keeps the rifle quick indoors, with more muzzle rise and heat under sustained fire. Tony had the gas interface retained from the original Mk47 design, while the muzzle setup was converted for compatible 5.45 AK devices.
